bookSourceComment: 笔趣阁小说站，搜索返回JSON格式，正文通过API获取。使用备用域名API直接获取正文，无需WebView验证。使用发现功能可以浏览各分类书籍。

ruleContent.content:
var url = String(result); var match = url.match(/book\/(\d+)\/(\d+)\.html/); if(!match){ java.toast('章节URL格式错误: ' + url); result; } var bookId = match[1]; var chapterId = match[2]; var apiDomain = source.getVariable(); if(!apiDomain){ apiDomain = '5b78c.bqg353.xyz'; } var apiUrl = 'https://' + apiDomain + '/api/chapter?id=' + bookId + '&chapterid=' + chapterId; try{ var jsonStr = java.ajax(apiUrl); var data = JSON.parse(jsonStr); if(data && data.txt){ var txt = data.txt.replace(/\n/g, '
'); txt = txt.replace(/请收藏本站.*|手机版.*|bqg\d+\.com/gi, ''); txt; }else{ java.toast('获取正文失败'); result; } }catch(e){ java.toast('API调用失败，尝试切换域名'); var domains = ['5b78c.bqg353.xyz', 'www.bqg172.xyz', 'www.bqgui.cc']; for(var i = 0; i < domains.length; i++){ try{ apiUrl = 'https://' + domains[i] + '/api/chapter?id=' + bookId + '&chapterid=' + chapterId; jsonStr = java.ajax(apiUrl); data = JSON.parse(jsonStr); if(data && data.txt){ source.setVariable(domains[i]); var txt = data.txt.replace(/\n/g, '
'); txt = txt.replace(/请收藏本站.*|手机版.*|bqg\d+\.com/gi, ''); txt; break; } }catch(e2){ continue; } } result; }
